_note: Viability signals for contested Washoe County NV Legislature primaries, June 9, 2026. Finance figures are 2026-cycle as reported by the Reno Gazette Journal / Nevada Independent candidate guides (drawn from NV SoS Aurora C&E reports). Amounts are rounded integer dollars as published by those sources. NEVER fabricated; candidates/fields left out where no real datum was found.
